name: git-your-lark
description: Preview-first Markdown workspace publishing to Lark/Feishu through lark-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Publish Markdown workspaces to Lark with reviewable sync previews.
interface.longDescription: Git Your Lark is a Codex plugin that uses lark-cli to publish local Markdown workspaces into Lark/Feishu documents. It generates reviewable sync previews before publishing changes and verifies remote documents after sync.
defaultPrompt: Sync this Markdown workspace to Lark.
Preview this Lark sync before publishing.
